SEARCH
Module Final_Project_OOP
Package com.fincredit.model

Class LoanProduct

java.lang.Object
com.fincredit.model.LoanProduct
All Implemented Interfaces:
ILoanable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ConsumerLoan, EducationalLoan, FreeInvestmentLoan, MortgageLoan
public abstract class LoanProduct extends Object implements ILoanable
Abstract class representing a loan product, implementing the ILoanable interface and providing common functionality for calculating monthly payments and generating amortization tables.

  • Method Summary

    Method
    Description
    double
    calculateMonthlyPayment(double principal, double annualRate, int terms)
    Method to calculate the monthly payment for a loan using the standard amortization formula, which takes into account the principal amount, annual interest rate, and loan term in months.

    generateAmortizationTable(double principal, double annualRate, int terms)
    Method to generate an amortization table for a loan, which provides a breakdown of each payment over the life of the loan, including the interest portion, capital payment, and remaining balance after each payment.

  • Method Details

    • calculateMonthlyPayment

      public double calculateMonthlyPayment(double principal, double annualRate, int terms)
      Method to calculate the monthly payment for a loan using the standard amortization formula, which takes into account the principal amount, annual interest rate, and loan term in months. If the interest rate is zero, it simply divides the principal by the number of terms.
      Specified by:
      calculateMonthlyPayment in interface ILoanable
      Parameters:
      principal - The total amount of the loan.
      annualRate - The annual interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 5 for 5%).
      terms - The total number of monthly payments (loan term in months).
      Returns:
      The calculated monthly payment amount.

    • generateAmortizationTable

      public List<AmortizationRow> generateAmortizationTable(double principal, double annualRate, int terms)
      Method to generate an amortization table for a loan, which provides a breakdown of each payment over the life of the loan, including the interest portion, capital payment, and remaining balance after each payment. The method iterates through each payment period, calculating the interest and capital payment based on the remaining balance and monthly payment, and stores this information in a list of AmortizationRow objects.
      Specified by:
      generateAmortizationTable in interface ILoanable

    • getType

      Specified by:
      getType in interface ILoanable
